basic_details.job_title: JIPMER Recruitment 2026 - Walkin for DEO, Project Technical Support Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Jawaharlal Institute of Postgraduate Medical Education and Research (JIPMER)
basic_details.post_name: Project Technical support - II / Data Entry Operator
basic_details.short_information: Jawaharlal Institute of Postgraduate Medical Education and Research (JIPMER) Project Technical Support-II / Data Entry Operator Notification 2026 has been released on 24 June 2026 on the official website jipmer.edu.in. A total of 2 vacancies have been announced through the JIPMER Project Technical Support-II / Data Entry Operator Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: 12th with Science + Diploma (MLT/DMLT or equivalent) + Five years experience, Three Years Graduate degree in relevant subject/field + two years experience, Bachelor's degree in Computer Application/IT/Computer Sciences, Diploma in Computer Application/IT/Computer Sciences with 2 years experience
qualification.details: Project Technical support - II: 12th with Science + Diploma (MLT/DMLT or equivalent) + Five years experience in relevant subject/field OR Three Years Graduate degree in relevant subject / field + two years experience in relevant subject. Disciplines: MLT, Pharmacology, Biotechnology and Biochemistry. Data entry operator: Bachelor's degree in Computer Application/IT/Computer Sciences OR Diploma in Computer Application/IT/Computer Sciences with at least 2 years' experience.

salary_details.pay_scale: Rs. 20,000+20% HRA/ Month, Rs. 29,200/- per Month
salary_details.details: Project Technical support - II: Rs. 20,000+20% HRA/ Month Data entry operator: Rs. 29,200/- per Month

selection_process: Certificate Verification MCQ based screening test Interview Written test (if more than 10 applicants)

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for JIPMER Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for JIPMER Recruitment 2026 is scheduled for 02nd July 2026. Candidates should ensure they reach the venue on time with all necessary documents.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Project Technical support - II and Data Entry Operator posts?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies announced by JIPMER. One vacancy is for the Project Technical support - II post and another is for the Data Entry Operator post.

faq.question: Q3. What is the maximum age limit for the JIPMER recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for all the posts announced under this recruitment drive is 30 years.

faq.question: Q4. What are the educational qualifications required for the Data Entry Operator post?
faq.answer: For the Data Entry Operator position, candidates must possess a Bachelor's degree in Computer Application/IT/Computer Sciences or a Diploma in Computer Application/IT/Computer Sciences with at least 2 years of experience.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for JIPMER Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary offered for the Project Technical support - II post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Project Technical support - II post will receive a salary of Rs. 20,000 + 20% HRA per month.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for these JIPMER posts?
faq.answer: The selection process includes Certificate Verification, an MCQ based screening test, and an Interview. A written test may also be conducted if more than 10 applicants apply.

faq.question: Q8. Where will the walk-in interview for JIPMER Recruitment 2026 be held?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be held at Jawaharlal Institute of Postgraduate Medical Education and Research (JIPMER), Puducherry - 605006.

faq.question: Q9. What documents should candidates carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must carry all original documents, one set of self-attested photocopies, ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates, and category certificates (if applicable).

faq.question: Q10. Is this a permanent government job?
faq.answer: No, this is a contract-based job opportunity announced by JIPMER.
